scripts.dev:all: npx concurrently -k -n "SV,TS,BE,CL" -c "magenta,blue,green,cyan" "npm run dev:service" "npm run sync:types" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build:all: npx concurrently -k -n "SV,TS,BE,CL" -c "magenta,blue,green,cyan" "npm run build:service" "npm run sync:types" "npm run build:backend" "npm run build:client"
